name: pr0ta
description: Automate creative media production on PR0TA: AI image, video, voice, music, client review rooms, downloads, and timeline workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Creative media production workflows for PR0TA.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through PR0TA app and API workflows for generating images, videos, voiceovers, music, and sound effects, then assembling, reviewing, downloading, and refining production timelines.
defaultPrompt: Generate PR0TA media with API calls.
Review and refine a PR0TA timeline.
